description:
Verso (original use): Fragment of a petition or other formal state correspondence. The beginnings of 8 lines are preserved, mostly consisting of honorifics for the addressee. 

There are also some notations in the upper margin; these might relate to the document on recto or could be the tarjama of the petition.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
